arts.ttl: Kick-off time change for Palace versus Aston Villa
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's Premier League match against Aston Villa will now kick-off at the earlier time of 19:30 GMT on Tuesday, 25th February, having been brought forward for broadcast.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this weekend's games
arts.sum: Aaron Ashley has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Team News: West Ham United vs. Crystal Palace injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between West Ham United and Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: “Very happy” | Hammers midfielder hits form for Potter
arts.sum: After the Hammers picked up an important three points against Fulham earlier this week, Spanish midfielder Carlos Soler spoke of his delight at scoring his first goal for the Club since joining on loan from PSG in the summer. Tuesday’s game at home to Fulham marked new Hammers boss’ Graham Potter’s first Premier League game... arts.ttl: The key quotes from Glasner's pre-West Ham press conference
arts.sum: Manager Oliver Glasner says Crystal Palace are aiming for a more consistent performance across 90 minutes, as the Eagles look to extend their strong start to the New Year against West Ham.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace attacker slight injury doubt for West Ham clash
arts.sum: The Austrian boss said Sarr is feeling a tightness in his hamstring ahead of the trip to the London Stadium. Glasner said: “We’ve a little small question about Ismaïla Sarr.

arts.ttl: Glasner on Lerma and Sarr fitness pre-West Ham
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has confirmed that Crystal Palace will be without Jefferson Lerma for Saturday’s trip to West Ham United.

arts.ttl: “Impressed” | Carlos Soler could earn permanent West Ham move
arts.sum: Carlos Soler could become a permanent West Ham player if he continues to impress under Graham Potter, according to a report from AS. Soler has had an indifferent spell in East London since arriving on deadline day on an initial loan deal. At the start of his time at the club, he didn’t look cut... arts.ttl: Graham Potter delivers positive update on Michail Antonio after horror car crash
arts.sum: Michail Antonio is out of action after being involved in a serious car crash last month but he was at West Ham's training ground this week to meet Graham Potter

arts.ttl: “Wants to join” | ExWHUEmployee | West Ham striker transfer update
arts.sum: West Ham appear to have a clearer option for our striker recruitment this January, it’s been reported by ExWHUEmployee. The club have been in talks with a number of clubs surrounding forwards we see as potential key targets, however the January market is causing a usual air of frustration, with clubs lacking appetite to sell....
